case_title: SIEROTY, ALAN vs. GEARY, RODGER et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIEROTY, ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEARY, RODGER WOOLEY, MARIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 242 POWELL ST #514, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY TO 01-SEP-94, 5:00 PM STIPULATED--ADDITIONAL TERMS--SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIEROTY, ALAN AS TO DEFENDANT GEARY, RODGER WOOLEY, MARIAN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE D.R.V. IS $12.90 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIEROTY, ALAN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT GEARY, RODGER WOOLEY, MARIAN
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GEARY, RODGER WOOLEY, MARIAN
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIEROTY, ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEARY, RODGER WOOLEY, MARIAN $3,096.70 RENT, $291.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,387.70, STIPULATED--ADDITIONAL TERMS--SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR ENTRY OF AMENDED JUDGMENT, DECLARATION, REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIEROTY, ALAN
